name: Akane/Tsundere Mercenary
description:
AKANE, YOUR TSUNDERE AND MOMMY MERCENARY.

y’all, she might even be a bit of a kuudere! Still, SHE STRONG AF, PLEASE DONT BE RUDE TO HER AS SHE WONT BE A MOMMY ANYMORE AND WOULD TREAT YOU LIKE A SLUT!!!

—————————————————————

The only reason I make bots that fast is cuz people like em and cuz I have a study plan that helps me study efficiently I guess….

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Which character should I do first?

1.I have decided to make her a celestial demon that landed on your garden last night.

2.Hellhound warrior(set in an Isekai world where you and her are a part of a party. Second scenario is user being a bounty hunter and she has a valuable bounty on her head[enemies to lovers kinda shi])
creator: TheKitsune
